import{j as e}from"./index-BrdSe0CA.js";import{f as T}from"./charts-7pOQm6Mk.js";import"./documents-Bhnlew-O.js";function A(c){const{Coins:p,currentUser:x,expenses:m,handleManualSafeTransaction:u,language:s,products:h,safeTxAmount:b,safeTxNotes:y,safeTxType:n,setSafeTxAmount:f,setSafeTxNotes:N,setSafeTxType:d,setSelectedSafeOp:i,transactions:j}=c;return e.jsxs("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6",children:[e.jsxs("div",{className:"md:col-span-4 bg-slate-50 p-5 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 space-y-4",children:[e.jsxs("h4",{className:"font-bold text-sm text-slate-800 flex items-center gap-1.5 border-b pb-2",children:[e.jsx(p,{className:"w-4.5 h-4.5 text-violet-500"}),s==="ar"?"تسوية الخزنة يدويًا":"Manual Cash safe Adjustments"]}),e.jsxs("form",{onSubmit:u,className:"space-y-3.5 text-xs",children:[e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-650 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"نوع التسوية:":"Adjustment Type:"}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 font-bold",children:[e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>d("DEPOSIT"),className:`py-2 rounded-xl border text-center transition cursor-pointer ${n==="DEPOSIT"?"bg-violet-600 text-white border-violet-600":"bg-white text-slate-600 border-slate-200"}`,children:s==="ar"?"إيداع رأس مال / كاش":"Manual Deposit In"}),e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>d("WITHDRAWAL"),className:`py-2 rounded-xl border text-center transition cursor-pointer ${n==="WITHDRAWAL"?"bg-violet-600 text-white border-violet-600":"bg-white text-slate-600 border-slate-200"}`,children:s==="ar"?"سحب نقدي طارئ":"Manual Cashout Out"})]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-650 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"مبلغ التسوية ($) *":"Amount ($) *"}),e.jsx("input",{type:"number",required:!0,min:"1",value:b,onChange:t=>f(Math.max(1,Number(t.target.value))),className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 font-bold"})]}),e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[11px] font-bold text-slate-650 mb-1",children:s==="ar"?"سبب التسوية وملاحظاتك":"Reason / Reference Notes"}),e.jsx("textarea",{value:y,onChange:t=>N(t.target.value),placeholder:"e.g., Emergency office supplies, partner deposit...",className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 text-xs focus:ring-1 focus:ring-violet-500 outline-none",rows:3})]}),e.jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"w-full bg-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-700 text-white font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded-xl shadow-md transition cursor-pointer",children:s==="ar"?"حفظ وتدوين حركة الصندوق":"Post Adjustment to Safe"})]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"md:col-span-8 space-y-4",children:[e.jsx("span",{className:"text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider block",children:s==="ar"?"كشف حركة الصندوق والخزينة المفصل":"Dynamic Cash Ledger Sheet & Audit Statement"}),e.jsx("div",{className:"border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden max-h-[350px] overflow-y-auto",children:e.jsxs("table",{className:"w-full text-left text-xs divide-y divide-slate-150",children:[e.jsx("thead",{className:"bg-slate-50 text-[10px] text-slate-500 font-bold uppercase",children:e.jsxs("tr",{children:[e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"تفاصيل الحركة والعملية":"Ledger Event"}),e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"التصنيف":"Source"}),e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"المبلغ الداخل (كاش)":"Cash In"}),e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"المبلغ الخارج":"Cash Out"}),e.jsx("th",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:s==="ar"?"الوقت":"Date"})]})}),e.jsxs("tbody",{className:"divide-y divide-slate-100 bg-white",children:[j.map(t=>{const a=t.paymentMethod||"CASH",g=t.type==="OUT"&&(a==="CASH"||a==="CARD")||t.type==="PURCHASE_RETURN"&&a==="CASH"||t.type==="SAFE_DEPOSIT",S=t.type==="IN"&&a==="CASH"||t.type==="SALE_RETURN"&&a==="CASH"||t.type==="SAFE_WITHDRAWAL";if(!g&&!S)return null;const o=t.quantity*t.unitPrice,r=t.type==="OUT"||t.type==="PURCHASE_RETURN"||t.type==="SAFE_DEPOSIT",l=h.find(v=>v.id===t.productId);return e.jsxs("tr",{onClick:()=>i({id:t.id,sourceType:"TRANSACTION",title:t.notes||(r?s==="ar"?"عملية بيع نقدي مخرجة من الكاشير":"Sales Receipt Cashier checkout":s==="ar"?"عملية توريد وإعادة تعبئة مخزون":"Supplier restocking checkout"),category:t.type,amount:o,date:t.date,notes:t.notes,quantity:t.quantity,unitPrice:t.unitPrice,productId:t.productId}),className:"hover:bg-indigo-50/40 text-slate-700 cursor-pointer transition border-b border-slate-100",children:[e.jsxs("td",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:[e.jsx("span",{className:"font-bold text-indigo-950",children:t.notes||(r?s==="ar"?"عملية بيع نقدي مخرجة من الكاشير":"Sales Receipt Cashier checkout":s==="ar"?"عملية توريد وإعادة تعبئة مخزون":"Supplier restocking checkout")}),e.jsxs("span",{className:"text-[10px] text-slate-400 block mt-0.5",children:["Prod: ",(l==null?void 0:l.name)||"Item"," (x",t.quantity,")"]})]}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:e.jsx("span",{className:`px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold ${r?"bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700":"bg-red-50 text-red-700"}`,children:t.type})}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-emerald-600 font-bold",children:r?`+$${o.toFixed(2)}`:"-"}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-rose-600 font-bold",children:r?"-":`-$${o.toFixed(2)}`}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 text-[10px] font-mono text-slate-400",children:new Date(t.date).toLocaleDateString()})]},`ledger_${t.id}`)}),x.role==="admin"&&m.map(t=>e.jsxs("tr",{onClick:()=>i({id:t.id,sourceType:"EXPENSE",title:t.title,category:t.category,amount:t.amount,date:t.date,notes:t.notes}),className:"hover:bg-rose-50/40 text-slate-700 cursor-pointer transition bg-rose-500/5 border-b border-slate-100",children:[e.jsxs("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 font-semibold text-rose-800",children:[t.title,t.notes&&e.jsx("span",{className:"text-[10px] text-slate-400 block font-normal mt-0.5",children:t.notes})]}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3",children:e.jsx("span",{className:"bg-rose-100 text-rose-700 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold uppercase",children:t.category})}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-slate-400",children:"-"}),e.jsxs("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 font-mono text-rose-600 font-bold",children:["-$",t.amount.toFixed(2)]}),e.jsx("td",{className:"px-4 py-3 text-[10px] font-mono text-slate-400",children:new Date(t.date).toLocaleDateString()})]},`ledger_${t.id}`))]})]})})]})]})}const R=T.memo(A);export{R as default};
